l2_description: Vacuum fruit merging. Goal: 1 fruit of size 3 on goal area. 8 size-0 fruits. Phase 1 (4 clicks): merge 4 pairs into 4 size-1. Phase 2 (7 clicks): merge upper pair of size-1 into size-2, merge lower pair into size-2. Phase 3 (3 clicks): merge two size-2s into size-3. Phase 4 (3 clicks): move size-3 onto goal at (33,27).
